[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101011101 6
1 0110000011 4
2 0101010000 3
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a

7 1100000101 4
